title: Allocation
description: Breakdown of how an amount was allocated to a specific target. Used by discounts, fees, and other extensions that distribute amounts across line items or other order components.

path.description: JSONPath (RFC 9535) expression identifying the allocation target (e.g., '$.line_items[0]', '$.totals.shipping').

amount.description: Amount allocated to this target in ISO 4217 minor units.
